title: Hieracium detruncatum
intro: Hieracium detruncatum, also known as blunt hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which may help to soothe digestive issues and boost the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium detruncatum include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of mild gastrointestinal disorders.
